topic: NLP-Based Automation of Systematic Literature Reviews in Computer Science
rqs: What is the impact of transformer models versus manual screening on precision, recall, and F1‑score in systematic literature reviews of computer science?

Which NLP‑based automation techniques (e.g., BERT classifiers, topic modeling, information extraction) reduce automation time while maintaining coverage compared to keyword search in digital libraries?
In which digital library contexts (e.g., IEEE Xplore, ACM DL, arXiv) do screening bots outperform rule‑based or classical ML systems in recall and automation time?
base_query: ("Computer Science Researchers" OR "Software Engineers" OR "Data Scientists" OR "Systematic Review Authors" OR "researcher") AND ("Transformer Models" OR "BERT Classifiers" OR "Topic Modeling" OR "Information Extraction" OR "Screening Bots") AND ("Manual Screening" OR "Keyword Search" OR "Rule Based Systems" OR "Classical Machine Learning" OR "Heuristic Baselines") AND ("precision" OR "recall" OR "f1score" OR "Automation Time" OR "Coverage") AND ("Digital Libraries" OR "Conference Proceedings" OR "ArXiv Preprints" OR "IEEE Xplore" OR "ACM Digital Library")
arxiv_query: (all:"Computer Science Researchers" OR all:"Software Engineers" OR all:"Data Scientists" OR all:"Systematic Review Authors" OR all:"researcher") AND (all:"Transformer Models" OR all:"BERT Classifiers" OR all:"Topic Modeling" OR all:"Information Extraction" OR all:"Screening Bots") AND (all:"Manual Screening" OR all:"Keyword Search" OR all:"Rule Based Systems" OR all:"Classical Machine Learning" OR all:"Heuristic Baselines") AND (all:"precision" OR all:"recall" OR all:"f1score" OR all:"Automation Time" OR all:"Coverage") AND (all:"Digital Libraries" OR all:"Conference Proceedings" OR all:"ArXiv Preprints" OR all:"IEEE Xplore" OR all:"ACM Digital Library")

include: arXiv CS categories (cs.AI, cs.LG, cs.IR, cs.SE)
cited ≥1 or presented at recognized venue

questions.text: Is the study’s objective and research question explicitly defined?
Are the NLP methods (e.g., BERT, topic modeling) described in sufficient detail to replicate?
Does the evaluation report precision, recall, and F1‑score on a clearly defined test set?
Are the datasets and digital libraries used (e.g., IEEE Xplore, ACM DL) fully documented?
Is the comparison against manual screening or baseline methods statistically analyzed?
